text.title: Cloud Waste Elimination and Non-Production Scheduling Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Apply decision tree in `content/06-decision-tree.xml`; verify cloud spend, audit gap, and stakeholder authority preconditions.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: inventory-and-tag-audit
step.action: Pull resource inventory; categorise idle candidates; verify tag coverage. Reject scopes with <80% tag coverage — fix tagging first.

step.name: draft-schedules-and-exceptions
step.action: For each non-prod env, draft schedule + exceptions per non-prod-scheduled-shutdown rule. Document exception expiries.

step.name: automate-scanner
step.action: Provision weekly idle scanner with dry-run default; wire approvals; configure alert channel.

step.name: validate-and-commit
step.action: Run validator script; address every violation; commit artefact and register KPI targets in cost dashboard.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
